night_squid.name: Night Squid
night_squid.chat_trigger: Pitch Darkness reveals a Night Squid.

agarimoo.name: Agarimoo
agarimoo.chat_trigger: Your Chumcap Bucket trembles, it's an Agarimoo.

sea_guardian.name: Sea Guardian
sea_guardian.chat_trigger: You stumbled upon a Sea Guardian.

sea_archer.name: Sea Archer
sea_archer.chat_trigger: You reeled in a Sea Archer

rider_of_the_deep.name: Rider of the Deep
rider_of_the_deep.chat_trigger: The Rider of the Deep has emerged.

carrot_king.name: Carrot King
carrot_king.chat_trigger: Is this even a fish? It's the Carrot King!

guardian_defender.name: Guardian Defender
guardian_defender.chat_trigger: You've discovered a Guardian Defender of the sea.

deep_sea_protector.name: Deep Sea Protector
deep_sea_protector.chat_trigger: You have awoken the Deep Sea Protector, prepare for a battle!

water_hydra.name: Water Hydra
water_hydra.chat_trigger: The Water Hydra has come to test your Strength.

frosty.name: Frosty
frosty.chat_trigger: Its a Snowman! It looks harmless

nutcracker.name: Nutcracker
nutcracker.chat_trigger: You found a forgotten Nutcracker laying beneath the ice

frozen_steve.name: Frozen Steve
frozen_steve.chat_trigger: Frozen Steve fell into the pond long ago

reindrake.name: Reindrake
reindrake.chat_trigger: A Reindrake forms from the depths.

nightmare.name: Nightmare
nightmare.chat_trigger: You hear trotting from beneath the waves, you caught a Nightmare

werewolf.name: Werewolf
werewolf.chat_trigger: It must be a full moon, it's a Werewolf!

phantom_fisher.name: Phantom Fisher
phantom_fisher.chat_trigger: The spirit of a long lost Phantom Fisher has come to haunt you.

grim_reaper.name: Grim Reaper
grim_reaper.chat_trigger: This can't be! The manifestation of death himself!

magma_slug.name: Magma Slug
magma_slug.chat_trigger: From beneath the lava appears a Magma Slug

moogma.name: Moogma
moogma.chat_trigger: You hear a faint Moo from the lava

lava_leech.name: Lava Leech
lava_leech.chat_trigger: A small but fearsome Lava Leech emerges.

pyroclastic_worm.name: Pyroclastic Worm
pyroclastic_worm.chat_trigger: You feel the heat radiating as a Pyroclastic Worm surfaces.

lava_flame.name: Lava Flame
lava_flame.chat_trigger: A Lava Flame flies out from beneath the lava.

fire_eel.name: Fire Eel
fire_eel.chat_trigger: A Fire Eel slithers out from the depths

thunder.name: Thunder
thunder.chat_trigger: You hear a massive rumble as Thunder emerges.

lord_jawbus.name: Lord Jawbus
lord_jawbus.chat_trigger: You have angered a legendary creature

fried_chicken.name: Fried Chicken
fried_chicken.chat_trigger: Smells of burning. Must be a Fried Chicken.

fireproof_witch.name: Fireproof Witch
fireproof_witch.chat_trigger: Trouble's brewing, it's a Fireproof Witch!

fiery_scuttler.name: Fiery Scuttler
fiery_scuttler.chat_trigger: A Fiery Scuttler inconspicuously waddles up to you, friends in tow.

ragnarok.name: Ragnarok
ragnarok.chat_trigger: The sky darkens and the air thickens. The end times are upon us: Ragnarok is here.

nurse_shark.name: Nurse Shark
nurse_shark.chat_trigger: A tiny fin emerges from the water

blue_shark.name: Blue Shark
blue_shark.chat_trigger: You spot a fin as blue as the water it came from

tiger_shark.name: Tiger Shark
tiger_shark.chat_trigger: A striped beast bounds from the depths

great_white.name: Great White Shark
great_white.chat_trigger: Hide no longer, a Great White Shark has tracked your scent and thirsts for your blood!

ent.name: Ent
ent.chat_trigger: You've hooked an Ent, as ancient as the forest itself.

loch_emperor.name: The Loch Emperor
loch_emperor.chat_trigger: The Loch Emperor arises from the depths.

nessie.name: Nessie
nessie.chat_trigger: You've caused a disturbance in the loch. Could it be... Nessie?

frog_man.name: Frog Man
frog_man.chat_trigger: Is it a frog? Is it a man? Well, yes, sorta, IT'S FROG MAN!!!!!!

snapping_turtle.name: Snapping Turtle
snapping_turtle.chat_trigger: A Snapping Turtle is coming your way, and it's ANGRY!

blue_ringed_octopus.name: Blue Ringed Octopus
blue_ringed_octopus.chat_trigger: A garish set of tentacles arise. It's a Blue Ringed Octopus!

wiki_tiki.name: Wiki Tiki
wiki_tiki.chat_trigger: The water bubbles and froths. A massive form emerges- you have disturbed the Wiki Tiki! You shall pay the price.
